original_query: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM dbo.FactSales GROUP BY region ORDER BY revenue DESC
converted_query: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM rdm.mart_sales_daily GROUP BY region ORDER BY revenue DESC

original_query: SELECT product_name, SUM(qty) AS units FROM dbo.FactSales f JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON f.product_id=p.product_id GROUP BY product_name
converted_query: SELECT product_name, SUM(qty) AS units FROM rdm.mart_sales_daily f JOIN sales.dim_product p ON f.product_key=p.product_key GROUP BY product_name
